articles.author: Alex Horton, Ellen Francis, Noah Robertson
articles.title: Pentagon abruptly cancels troop deployment to Europe amid frustrations with NATO - The Washington Post
articles.description: The Pentagon canceled a planned deployment of 4,000 troops to Poland, as the White House expresses frustration over NATO's non-participation in the Iran war.
articles.content: The Pentagon has abruptly withdrawn thousands of soldiers from a planned deployment to Poland, officials said Thursday, part of a larger troop reduction that comes as President Donald Trump hasexpres… [+58 chars]
